---
title: "Are dark-backed birds darker overall?"
author: "Ore, MJ."
date: "2025-03-10"
output: rmarkdown::github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F)
# load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)

```


```{r prep data - geographic variation in color, echo = FALSE}

here::i_am("R_scripts/Color_correlations.Rmd")


avg_img <- read.csv(here("data/BTBW_whole_specimen_Image_Analysis_measurements_allpop_avgimg_wide.csv"))

## select only brightness for ASY males
asy <- avg_img %>% 
  filter(Age == "ASY")

```

# normality checks

```{r normality, echo = F}

vars_to_check <- unique(unlist(lapply(comparisons, function(cmp) c(cmp$x, cmp$y))))

for (v in vars_to_check) {
  hist(asy[[v]], main = v, xlab = v)
}

```


# make a table of results
```{r color model table, echo=F}

# response ~ predictor pairs
model_specs <- list(
  # association with mantle
  c("PC1_c", "PC1_d"), c("PC1_t", "PC1_d"), c("PC1_o", "PC1_d"),
  c("PC1_b", "PC1_d"), c("area_mm2_w", "PC1_d"),
  # associations with wing spot color
  c("PC1_c", "PC1_w"), c("PC1_o", "PC1_w"), c("PC1_b", "PC1_w"),
  c("PC1_d", "PC1_w"), c("PC1_t", "PC1_w"),
  # association with wing spot area
  c("PC1_c", "area_mm2_w"), c("PC1_o", "area_mm2_w"), c("PC1_b", "area_mm2_w"),
  c("PC1_d", "area_mm2_w"), c("PC1_t", "area_mm2_w")
)

# Fit all models and extract results in one pipeline
results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(model_specs, function(spec) {
  response    <- spec[1]
  explanatory <- spec[2]
  
  fml   <- as.formula(paste(response, "~", explanatory, "+ (1|Year)"))
  model <- lmerTest::lmer(fml, data = asy, na.action = na.exclude)
  
  R2m     <- MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1]
  p_value <- summary(model)$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]
  
  data.frame(Response = response, Explanatory = explanatory,
             R2m = R2m, P_value = p_value, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}))

results_rounded <- results %>% 
   mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ ifelse(. < 0.001, 
                                           sprintf("%.2e", .),  # scientific notation
                                           sprintf("%.2g", .)))) # 3 sig figs
#change names for table presentation
pcnames <- c(
  "PC1_c" = "Crown PC1",
  "PC1_o" = "Covert PC1",
  "PC1_b" = "Belly PC1",
  "PC1_d" = "Mantle PC1",
  "PC1_t" = "Throat PC1",
  "PC1_w" = "Wing spot PC1",
  "area_mm2_w" = "Wing spot area (mm²)"
)

formnames <- c(
  "PC1_d" = "Fixed effect: Dorsum PC1, Random effect: Year",
  "PC1_w" = "Fixed effect: Wing spot PC1, Random effect: Year",
  "area_mm2_w" = "Fixed effect: Wing spot area (mm²), Random effect: Year"
)

results_rnm <- results_rounded %>%
  mutate(Response = recode(Response, !!!pcnames)) %>% 
  mutate(Explanatory = recode(Explanatory, !!!formnames))
# View the results
print(results_rnm)

write.csv(results_rnm, file = here("results/Color_lmm_model_results.csv"), row.names = F)

```
